title: metopium toxiferum
intro: Metopium toxiferum, also known as the poison tree or poisonwood, is a plant species in the family Anacardiaceae, native to the Caribbean and Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Metopium toxiferum include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant, including extracts and infusions, have been used to treat various ailments, but due to its toxicity, caution and proper guidance are necessary when using it.
